import React from 'react'; const Hero = ({ movie, onWatchClick }) => { if (!movie) { // Default Static Hero from UI snippet return (
auto_awesome 98% Match Sci-Fi Thriller • 2024

NEURAL DRIFT

In a world where memories are currency, a data-thief uncovers a conspiracy buried deep within the city's central mainframe.

); } return (
auto_awesome {movie.rating ? Math.round(movie.rating * 10) : 95}% Match {movie.genres?.[0]} • {movie.year}

{movie.title}

{movie.synopsis || movie.overview}

); }; export default Hero;
